textByHashes.d270318d18edbc67d0816a6d31e5e5c7b532b4f4: You there! Over here! Let's have a little chat before you head up there!
textByHashes.4abd8a8162ce2d13131be21a6d6fdeea1e3f9864: Hello there, my short-tongued friend. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.e84970a1e2739ca9c57fefb70944511474ec8a58: What do you think I'm doing here?
textByHashes.9a72bf75a3180f62b47a9e9ea755ab48b2bd3dcc: How disappointing. I enjoy a good guessing game! No matter. My colleague and I are here are on a mission of preservation!
textByHashes.55f2922e432d7e4242722f634c74ba28313d92b6: Preservation of these magnificent colossal wyrm remains, of course! You see, we have a termite problem.
textByHashes.5c9a696fcd99d3eef4c24709aff62c93accae4cf: Indeed! And while my archaeological skills are certainly exemplary, I also bring a certain set of more unique skills to this troublesome assignment.
textByHashes.8c414777e7e611a7d8cf6645a99410770ea9cdb6: Ahem! I am able to dispose of the termites in ways others cannot.
textByHashes.a34a5524ecdde6476659a5a8dc675827e96ca8a8: Why yes! It seems our scaffolding has proven to be a useful place for adventurous types to practice running and jumping in quick succession.
textByHashes.a025f0e53fdd91c154d943825c82ef923b62f989: Should you also wish to practice these skills, you may come across the aforementioned termites while you traverse the ropes. Simply scoop them up and bring them to me.
textByHashes.886eb61c303151595b1854d0440fb09f111f2483: I'll happily exchange them for some goodies I've collected during my time here! You can also keep any bone shards they may have unfortunately chipped off.
textByHashes.c6f11ceeedc1682a4f07b13a10e409e18f525982: Wonderful! To get started, just use the ladder by the wyrm's skull to climb up onto the scaffolding.
textByHashes.218859e2ca31e5aeb56346e9ee8cb632ff471510: Initially the route is the same for everyone, but part way round you'll find a loftier section of scaffolding. If you're skilled, that route might be more appealing to you.
textByHashes.0d77ea042bec448158161406361ca4217cb42a6e: That said, don't go up there unless you know what you're doing. I have work to do so I can't spend all my time patching people up when they hurt themselves!
textByHashes.3aab056b1bb3bd61be8d31ad1528149962fa0af1: Which route would you like to know about?
textByHashes.579cc48cb7a6d33d8eba465db987da394f04fd8d: You haven't completed any laps of the basic agility course yet. There's been X global completions and the global best time is X.
textByHashes.ff890b6dfcf8780aa4aece5adeb685c82705bf9b: You haven't completed any laps of the advanced agility course yet. There's been X global completions and the global best time is X.
